prompt: I just built this webhook server that syncs Stripe payments to Airtable. It's working in dev but I'm about to deploy it to a DigitalOcean droplet. What could go wrong?
assertions: Identifies missing Stripe webhook signature verification
Identifies duplicate record risk (no idempotency on Airtable writes)
Identifies missing error handling (no try/catch on async operations)
Identifies .env with live keys and no .gitignore
Identifies /sync/payments endpoint creates duplicates and is unauthenticated
Identifies null property access risk on session.customer_details.email
References specific file paths and line numbers
Provides actionable fix code snippets (not just descriptions)
Uses severity tiers to prioritise issues
Includes a clear verdict and suggested next action
